name: skill-reflect-auto
_comment: Metadata-only. Copilot CLI auto-discovers extension.mjs and registers hooks programmatically via joinSession(); the CLI does NOT read this file. Kept for humans/tooling.
description: Tracks nearby friction for observed skill candidates during Copilot CLI sessions, stages a compact unverified marker at session end, and emits a non-blocking nudge at the next session start. No AI or network calls. Review and provenance checks are deferred to the skill-reflect core skill after explicit authorization.
